case_title: KING RHOTON ET AL VS. BAUERS INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION

docket_entries.description: SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER RE: REQUEST TO DISMISS FILED BY DEFENDANT BAUERS INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
(SC-105) FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAUERS INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
ANSWER TO REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC-105) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RHOTON, KING RHOTON, GWEN COSTIGAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RHOTON, KING RHOTON, GWEN COSTIGAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAUERS INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION $3,125.68 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,190.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BAUERS INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,125.68 FILED BY RHOTON, KING RHOTON, GWEN COSTIGAN AS TO DEFENDANT BAUERS INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: GARY S. BAUER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RHOTON, KING RHOTON, GWEN COSTIGAN AS TO DEFENDANT BAUERS INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED AUG-10-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAUERS INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION
SC-109 AUTHORIZAION TO APPEAR (FOR OCT-03-18 HEARING) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAUERS INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION
ON (SC-105A) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS: DENIED. EXPLANATION FOR DECISION: THE COURT WILL HEAR THE DISPUTE AT THE HEARING 10/3/18 AT 3:30PM.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2018 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO OCT-15-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF'S KING & GWEN RHOTON ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAUER INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY FEARL COTTON, CLAIMS MANAGER. AFTER HEARING TESTIMONY AND REVIEWING EVIDENCE, HONORABLE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN GRANTED DEFENDANT A ONE TIME CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE AND WITNESSES TO BE PRODUCED BY DEFENDANT. PARTIES ARE EXPECTED TO COMPLETE TRIAL AT THE NEXT HEARING ON 10/15/18. PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-15-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS KING RHOTON AND GWEN COSTIGAN RHOTON. DEFENDANT BAUERS INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION DID NOT APPEAR. PLIANTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
